About Me

I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in creating dynamic, high-performance web applications and streamlining business processes. My skill set includes workflow automation, Search Engine Optimization, and CRM integration, allowing me to build comprehensive solutions that drive efficiency and growth.

Full Stack Development Workflow Automation Search Engine Optimization CRM Recruitment

Skillset

Full Stack Development

I build comprehensive, end-to-end web solutions, from the user interface to the server-side logic and database.

Workflow Automation

I streamline and automate business processes to increase efficiency and reduce manual effort.

Search Engine Optimization

I optimize websites to rank higher in search engine results, driving organic traffic and visibility.

CRM

I implement and customize Customer Relationship Management systems to manage and analyze customer interactions and data.

Recruitment

I leverage technology to build and streamline the recruitment process, from sourcing candidates to managing the hiring pipeline.

Hire Me

Why Hire Me?

1

Full-Stack Strategy
I combine deep technical development with SEO and CRM expertise to ensure your systems aren't just functional, but discoverable. Every line of code is written to drive performance and convert visitors into long-term customers.

2

Automation Architect
I build "agentic" workflows using tools like Make.com and n8n to eliminate repetitive "work about work" for good. My focus is on turning fragmented manual processes into seamless, high-efficiency automated engines.

3

Human-Centric Systems
With a background in recruitment and agency leadership, I translate complex technical audits into clear, actionable SOPs. I bridge the gap between advanced AI integration and the human teams that need to use them daily.
